prompt: Update the description of OMPBLINK-100 with rich markdown content: a heading '## Release Notes', bold and italic text, a bullet list of 3 items, a table with columns Feature/Status/Owner, and a JavaScript code block.
assertions: Uses jira.mjs edit command with --description flag
Description contains a bullet list (- item syntax)
Description contains a markdown table (| col | syntax)
Description contains a fenced code block (```js syntax)
marklassian converts the markdown to valid ADF — not raw markdown text rendered in Jira
Literal \n from shell arguments are converted to real newlines before ADF conversion
